description: Small capped-live smoke manifest for estimated API cost evidence. Usage-only live smoke is not launch-grade until quality gates and the full campaign threshold are satisfied.

tasks.baselinePrompt: Summarize the responsibilities of a React combobox component and list likely extraction boundaries.
tasks.fooksPrompt: Using a compact prepared context, summarize the responsibilities of a React combobox component and list likely extraction boundaries.

tasks.baselinePrompt: Draft a concise refactor plan for splitting a large TSX form section into components, hooks, utils, and types.
tasks.fooksPrompt: Using a compact prepared context, draft a concise refactor plan for splitting a large TSX form section into components, hooks, utils, and types.

nonGoals: The capped smoke manifest validates imported provider-cost evidence mechanics only; it is not launch-grade positive cost evidence by itself.
